user.title: Connect to AE-200E / EW-50E
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your Mitsubishi AE-200E or EW-50E controller (LAN1 interface).

data_description.host: The LAN1 IP address of the AE-200E controller (e.g. 192.168.1.10)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AE-200E. Check the IP address and ensure the controller is reachable on LAN1.

abort.already_configured: This AE-200E controller is already configured.
